mapper.sql: firmwareId, firmwareName, version, chipModelName, deviceType, url, fileSize, fileHash, description, isDefault, userId, createTime, updateTime
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_firmware (firmwareName, version, chipModelName, deviceType, url, fileSize, fileHash, description, isDefault, userId) VALUES (#{firmwareName}, #{version}, #{chipModelName}, #{deviceType}, #{url}, #{fileSize}, #{fileHash}, #{description}, #{isDefault}, #{userId})
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM sys_firmware WHERE chipModelName = #{chipModelName} AND deviceType IS NULL AND isDefault = '1' LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM sys_firmware WHERE chipModelName IS NULL AND deviceType IS NULL AND isDefault = '1' LIMIT 1
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_firmware SET isDefault = '0' WHERE isDefault = '1'
AND chipModelName = #{chipModelName} AND deviceType = #{deviceType}
AND chipModelName = #{chipModelName} AND deviceType IS NULL
AND chipModelName IS NULL AND deviceType IS NULL
